title: Remote work
prompt: Argue whether remote work is better than office work.
reference_text: Although remote work offers flexibility, I believe offices help teams collaborate more effectively.

title: Social media
prompt: Take a position on whether social media helps public debate.
reference_text: Social media can inform citizens quickly, yet it also spreads unverified claims.

title: Climate policy
prompt: Present one argument for stronger climate policy in your country.
reference_text: Stronger climate policy protects public health and reduces long-term economic risk.
